# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
  namespace: linkerd
data:
  config.yaml: |-
    admin:
      accessLogPath: /dev/stdout
    config:
      version: 2
    controlPlaneTracing:
      samplingDecision: always
    telemetry:
    - kind: io.l5d.representations
    - kind: io.l5d.structured
    - kind: io.l5d.prometheus
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-controller
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  namespace: linkerd
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-api
rules:
- apiGroups:
  - linkerd.io
  resources:
  - services
  verbs:
  - get
  - list
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-api
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: linkerd-proxy-api
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: linkerd
  namespace: linkerd
